name: Create anti-cheating tests from PDFs with GPT-4o-mini and Google Docs
description:
Extract content from PDFs, generate two different test versions with AI, and create formatted Google Docs with automated email delivery.
This workflow extracts text from PDF teaching materials, uses OpenAI to generate 10 test questions in two different versions (Group A and B), creates a formatted Google Doc, and sends an email notification with the document link. Perfect for teachers who need to prevent student cheating while saving time on test creation.

Tools used: OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, Google Docs, Google Drive, Gmail
